tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file as text. DEPRECATED: Use read_text_file instead.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system as text. Use head or tail to read only part of the file. Only works within allowed directories.

tools.name: read_media_file
tools.description: Read an image or audio file and return base64 data plus MIME type.

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read multiple files in one operation. Individual failures do not stop the whole request.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Apply exact text replacements to a file and return a unified diff.

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a directory, including any missing parents.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories within a path. Ignore-file filtering is opt-in at startup.

tools.name: list_directory_with_sizes
tools.description: List files and directories within a path, including file sizes.

tools.name: directory_tree
tools.description: Return a recursive JSON tree of files and directories. Ignore-file filtering is opt-in at startup.

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory within the allowed directories.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a glob-style pattern relative to the starting path.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Return size, timestamps, permissions, and type info for a file or directory.

tools.name: list_allowed_directories
tools.description: Return the directories that the server is allowed to access.

findings.description: Parameter 'path' accepts arbitrary file paths without validation
